title: Quick Link, Ekunbuy 304 Stainless Steel Heavy Duty Clips Chain Connector Repair Link Buckle for Swing Outdoor Camping
features: ✔【Size & Qty】Inside the parcel is six m3.5 mini quick links. 9/64" quick links are 1.45" long, 0.72" wide, 0.13" thick, 0.19" max opening, weigh 0.3 oz.
✔【Nicely Made】Glossy 304 stainless steel, corrosion resistant, safe and reliable, stable performance, open and close flexible.
✔【Strong & Sturdy】Working load: 176 lbs. Broken load: 352 lbs. Using hexagon nuts design, the clips will last much longer.
✔【Easy to Use】M3.5 quick link is a super easy way to connect wire rope and chain by rotating hex nut.

✔【Worked Great】9/64" quick link is perfect for hanging a bird feeder, light, dog collar, securing the gate locks, keychain clip hook, chain link, quick link chain connector, locking carabiner clips, mini locking d ring, stainless steel d clip, quick connect loop, d shape clips, d ring locking carabiner, small locking clip.
